item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import re
import shlex
from pathlib import Path

root = Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02')
config = json.loads((root / 'config/onboarding.json').read_text())
doc_path = root / 'docs/onboarding.md'
doc = doc_path.read_text()
blocks = re.findall(r'"'```sh'"\\n(.*?)\\n"'```'"', doc, flags=re.S)
expected = shlex.split(
    'onboard run --config config/onboarding.json '
    f'--mode {config[\"mode\"]} --max-parallel {config[\"max_parallel\"]} '
    f'--owner {config[\"owner\"]} '
    + ' '.join(f'--queue {queue}' for queue in config['queues'])
)
assert len(blocks) == 1
assert shlex.split(blocks[0]) == expected
print('PASS bounded_docs_step: existing example matches config exactly; edit_not_needed')
PY"

item.aggregated_output: PASS bounded_docs_step: existing example matches config exactly; edit_not_needed
